text: Net sales increased 2 percent year over year. Services revenue reached an all time high. Gross margin was 44 point 1 percent. Net income totaled 97 billion dollars. The company repurchased 77 billion dollars of its own shares.

Azure revenue grew 30 percent. Intelligent Cloud segment increased 17 percent. Office 365 commercial revenue grew 14 percent. LinkedIn revenue increased 8 percent. Gaming revenue declined 5 percent due to lower console sales.
Net sales increased 13 percent to 574 point 8 billion dollars. AWS revenue grew 17 percent to 90 point 8 billion. Operating income increased from 12 point 2 billion to 36 point 9 billion
Google Search revenue grew 5 percent. YouTube ads revenue increased 8 percent. Google Cloud revenue grew 26 percent. Total revenue was 307 billion dollars, up 9 percent year over year.
Family daily active people reached 3 point 14 billion. Ad impressions increased 28 percent. Revenue was 134 point 9 billion dollars, up 16 percent. Net income was 39 point 1 billion.
Data Center revenue surged 217 percent to 47 point 5 billion dollars. Total revenue reached 60 point 9 billion, up 126 percent. GAAP earnings per diluted share was 11 point 93 dollars.
